message:
fix: show empty state instead of indefinite refresh when no buildpacks resources found (#3656)

When no buildpacks CRDs exist on any cluster, the API returns 404 which
caused fetchGitOpsAPI to throw, triggering the cache retry loop. The card
would cycle between skeleton loading and failed state indefinitely.

Fix by catching 404 errors in the useCachedBuildpackImages fetcher and
returning an empty array, allowing the card to settle into its empty state.
Also add a Package icon to the empty state for better visual feedback.

Closes #3652

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
